summary: A maximalist, poster-like marketing site for RIPTIDE, an independent three-day coastal music and arts festival, covering the festival, lineup, schedule, tickets and travel.

pages.title: The Festival
pages.purpose: Hero overview of RIPTIDE: what it is, the six stages, the arts programme, press quotes and ticket CTA.

pages.title: Lineup
pages.purpose: Full 80+ act lineup with headliners, day-by-day poster columns and a genre breakdown.

pages.title: Schedule
pages.purpose: Set times across six stages for Friday, Saturday and Sunday, with a stage legend and planning notes.

pages.title: Tickets
pages.purpose: Pricing tiers, a feature comparison table, payment plans, add-ons, accessibility and ticket FAQs.

pages.title: Getting There
pages.purpose: Travel routes, an illustrated site map, accommodation options, on-site facilities, sustainability and travel FAQs.
